scripts.setup:maestro: brew tap mobile-dev-inc/tap && brew install maestro
scripts.setup: yarn install && yarn setup:ruby && yarn setup:maestro
scripts.watchman:reset: watchman shutdown-server 2>/dev/null || true; watchman watch-del-all 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.reset: yarn node:clean && yarn android:clean && yarn start -- --reset-cache
scripts.android:clean: rm -rf android/app/.cxx android/app/build android/build android/.gradle && cd android && ./gradlew clean || true
scripts.ios:clean: cd ios && xcodebuild clean -workspace IgniteKit.xcworkspace -scheme IgniteKit
scripts.ios:bundle:assets: react-native bundle --entry-file index.js --platform ios --dev false --bundle-output ios/main.jsbundle --assets-dest ios
scripts.ios:dev:release: yarn ios:clean && ENVFILE=.env.development react-native run-ios --scheme "IgniteKit development" --configuration Release
scripts.ios:staging:release: yarn ios:clean && ENVFILE=.env.staging react-native run-ios --scheme "IgniteKit staging" --configuration Release
scripts.ios:prod:release: yarn ios:clean && yarn ios:bundle:assets && ENVFILE=.env.production react-native run-ios --scheme "IgniteKit production" --configuration Release
scripts.eas:build:dev: yarn eas:version:check && eas build --profile development --platform all
scripts.eas:build:dev:ios: yarn eas:version:check && eas build --profile development --platform ios
scripts.eas:build:dev:android: yarn eas:version:check && eas build --profile development --platform android
scripts.eas:build:staging: yarn eas:version:check && eas build --profile staging --platform all
scripts.eas:build:staging:ios: yarn eas:version:check && eas build --profile staging --platform ios
scripts.eas:build:staging:android: yarn eas:version:check && eas build --profile staging --platform android
scripts.eas:build:prod: yarn eas:version:check && eas build --profile production --platform all
scripts.eas:build:prod:ios: yarn eas:version:check && eas build --profile production --platform ios
scripts.eas:build:prod:android: yarn eas:version:check && eas build --profile production --platform android
scripts.screenshots:1:build: xcodebuild -workspace ios/IgniteKit.xcworkspace -scheme 'IgniteKit staging' -configuration Release -sdk iphonesimulator -derivedDataPath ios/simulator-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO | grep -E 'error:|Build succeeded|Build FAILED'
scripts.screenshots:3:upload:ios: [ -f ./asc-api-key.json ] || (echo 'Error: asc-api-key.json not found. See docs/SCREENSHOTS.md.' && exit 1) && bundle exec fastlane run deliver api_key_path:./asc-api-key.json app_identifier:com.snapbiodata.app screenshots_path:./screenshots/ios skip_binary_upload:true skip_metadata:true overwrite_screenshots:true ignore_language_directory_validation:true force:true precheck_include_in_app_purchases:false
scripts.screenshots:3:upload:android: bundle exec fastlane run supply --skip_upload_apk --skip_upload_aab --skip_upload_metadata --sync_image_upload true
scripts.screenshots:all: yarn screenshots:1:build && yarn screenshots:2:capture && yarn screenshots:3:upload:ios
